U Umple

Download Umple

Get Umple for your preferred development environment

📦

Command Line (JAR)

Download the Umple JAR for command-line use. Requires Java 11 or later.

Download Latest JAR

Quick Start

# Download the JAR
curl -O https://cruise.umple.org/scripts/umple.jar

# Compile an Umple file to Java
java -jar umple.jar mymodel.ump

# Generate to a specific language
java -jar umple.jar -g Python mymodel.ump
📝

VS Code Extension

Syntax highlighting, code completion, and diagram preview for Umple in Visual Studio Code.

VS Code Marketplace

Install via CLI

code --install-extension umple.umple-language
🌙

Eclipse Plugin

Full Umple development environment within Eclipse IDE, including diagram editing and code generation.

Installation Guide
🐳

Docker Image

Run UmpleOnline locally with Docker. Includes the full web-based modeling environment.

Docker Hub

Quick Start

docker pull umple/umpleonline
docker run -p 8080:8080 umple/umpleonline

Package Managers

Homebrew (macOS / Linux)

brew install umple
View formula

Chocolatey (Windows)

choco install umple
View package

All Releases

Browse all past releases with changelogs and downloadable assets on GitHub.

View All Releases on GitHub

Umple is developed at the University of Ottawa with support from NSERC and the Digital Research Alliance of Canada.
